nasb.text: “Son of man, set your face against Pharaoh king of Egypt and prophesy against him and against all Egypt.

esv.text: “Son of man, set your face against Pharaoh king of Egypt, and prophesy against him and against all Egypt;

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要面向埃及王法老，說預言攻擊他和埃及全地。

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要说预言斥责埃及王法老和埃及全国，
